name: IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc.
business: IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc. is a precision medicine oncology company committed to the discovery, development and commercialization of transformative therapies for cancer. The company's clinical pipeline consists of nine potential first-in-class product candidates across four clinical focus areas, including darovasertib for uveal melanoma, antibody-drug conjugates (ADC)/DNA damage response (DDR) combinations, MTAP pathway inhibitors, and next generation therapies. As of December 31, 2025, the company had not generated any product revenue and had an accumulated deficit of $736.5 million.

exposures.sentence: We are a precision medicine oncology company committed to the discovery, development and commercialization of transformative therapies for cancer.

catalysts.event: Topline data expected from OptimUM-02 Phase 2/3 trial for darovasertib in first line metastatic uveal melanoma
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline data, including progression free survival (PFS) data, from this trial in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of full enrollment in OptimUM-02 trial
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we completed full enrollment of 437 patients in OptimUM-02, and plan to submit overall survival (OS) data from these patients, when available, to support a full approval filing in this indication.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of enrollment in OptimUM-01 trial for HLA*A2:01 positive metastatic uveal melanoma
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment of approximately 100 patients in this trial by the second quarter of 2026 with data used to support a potential future submission to the FDA to expand the labeled use for darovasertib and/or a national comprehensive cancer network (NCCN) compendia listing to enable use of the combination in these patients.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of enrollment in OptimUM-10 Phase 3 neoadjuvant trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to complete enrollment in this trial by the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of OptimUM-11 global Phase 3 adjuvant trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a global Phase 3 combination trial (OptimUM-11) of darovasertib and crizotinib in the adjuvant setting of primary UM in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of monotherapy registrational trial for IDE849 in second line/refractory small-cell lung cancer or neuroendocrine carcinomas
catalysts.sentence: We are currently conducting a global Phase 1 trial of IDE849 in SCLC, with the goal of initiating a monotherapy registrational trial in the second line/refractory setting (2L+) of SCLC and/or NEC by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: First patient in for IDE034 Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to achieve first-patient-in (FPI) in our Phase 1 dose escalation trial in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 combination trial for IDE161 with IDE849
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 1 clinical combination trial of IDE161 with IDE849 in SCLC, NEC, and potentially other DLL3-overexpressing solid tumors in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 dose escalation trial for IDE892 monotherapy
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin conducting a Phase 1 dose escalation trial with IDE892 monotherapy in the first quarter of 2026 with the goal of advancing into combination trials with IDE397 in MTAP-deleted NSCLC in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 dose escalation trial for IDE574
catalysts.sentence: We received IND clearance from the FDA in January 2026 and are targeting to begin a Phase 1 dose escalation trial in patients with breast, lung, prostate and colorectal cancers in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: GSK termination of Collaboration, Option and License Agreement effective
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, GSK notified us of its intention to terminate the Agreement, which will be effective March 9, 2026.
